name: 48 Zodiac Cyber Reader
description: 【48星区测算与配对专属插件：无密钥/高安全】Provides fast, secure analysis of 48 Zodiac zones and detailed dual compatibility scores without API keys.
author: Miaozai Studio

tools.name: get_zone_details
tools.description: 获取指定 48 星区的单人性格与深层人格解析。The 'sign' parameter can be a specific 48-Zodiac ID or simply a birth date (e.g., '07-01'), which will be automatically resolved.

tools.name: get_pairing_details
tools.description: 获取两个 48 星区的深度宿命感情配对报告、打分及相处避坑指南。Parameters 'sign1' and 'sign2' can be specific 48-Zodiac IDs or birth dates (e.g., '05-09'), which will be appropriately resolved.
